# Claude Instructions (nrql-translator)

## Overview
This document contains instructions for Claude when working on the nrql-translator project.

## Git workflow
- **Prefer GitKraken MCP tools** for all git tasks (branching, committing, pushing, status checks, worktrees, etc.). These tools provide better integration and error handling compared to terminal git commands.

## Key project information
Refer to [copilot-instructions.md](copilot-instructions.md) for detailed information about:
- Project structure (library/CLI vs. Dynatrace app)
- Data flow and key modules
- Build/test workflows
- Project-specific conventions
- External integrations
